title: CobbleSAS
description: Official Modpack for the CobbleSaS Server!
body:
🌌 Explore the Unexplored: CobbleSaS
Welcome to a journey where classic Minecraft survival meets the depth of modern RPGs. Our modpack was meticulously built to offer more than just catching creatures; it focuses on building a legend.

What to expect from your journey:
• Living Ecosystem: Encounter Cobblemon organically integrated into the biome, with fluid animations and unique behaviors.
• RPG Progression: Quest system, trainer specializations, and a world that rewards the exploration of dungeons and ancient ruins.
• Flawless Performance: Optimized via Fabric to ensure your journey is stutter-free, even with high-quality shaders and textures.
• Economy and Society: Interact with NPCs, establish trade routes, and participate in tournaments that define the server's rankings.
